source: plan/bearings.md § Group-buy hero art — colorful SVGs
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: 65% gasket-mount aluminum keyboard silhouette (Mode Sonnet R2) with warm bronze colorway — bronze gasket reveal strips along top and bottom plate edges, wide machined top bezel, right nav column + arrow cluster identifying the 65% layout
prompt: Mode Sonnet R2 is a 65% gasket-mount aluminum keyboard in a warm bronze colorway, announced for CannonKeys group buy 2026-06-01 through 2026-07-15. The composition centers a 65% case (972×360px) on the 1200×630 canvas. The single-splash accent is warm bronze (oklch(0.80 0.135 75)) — used as: a low-alpha bronze fill on the case body (the colorway), solid gasket reveal strips at the top and bottom of the case (14px bands at full bronze opacity, the defining gasket-mount visual tell), a wide top-bezel band at 0.28 alpha (Mode Sonnet is known for its thick machined top bezel), and crisp 1.5px stroke lines along the gasket flex boundaries. Alpha dot grid uses warm-grey circles at standard family weight. 65% layout is unambiguous: no F-row, 14-column alpha block across 4 alpha rows (number, QWERTY, home, bottom) plus mod/spacebar row; a 3-key right nav column (Del/Home/End as rounded rects) to the right of the alpha block; an inverted-T arrow cluster (up above, left/down/right beneath) at bottom-right with minimal chevron glyphs. Enter and right-shift are rendered as wide rounded rects rather than dots. Column guides at 0.10 opacity add depth without contesting the bronze. Bronze theme dot at upper-right (family ornament) and accent pip with halo at lower-right. Single-splash discipline: no second hue introduced anywhere. Voice: knowledgeable peer — the gasket strips are the load-bearing editorial element, reading the construction method directly into the silhouette.
